properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This is the day the bride has waiting for Going to the Father's promised land This earthly place is not our home Let go of everything and let God in

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Here He comes, Be ready for the coming of the Lord Be prepared we're going home And I can't hide away this joy that I kept feelin inside' me Be ready for He's coming soon

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Arise above the storms In every trials comes our way You light up our life And gave us reason to stay

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Arise above the storms In every trials comes our way I'll be leavin this world forever with you I will stay

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Arise Today, Be ready for the coming of the Lord Be prepared we're going home And I can't hide away this joy that I kept feelin inside' me Be ready for He's coming soon (2×)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And I'm ready to go owoah oh oh Ready for the coming of the Lord Im ready to go Ready for the coming of the Lord Soon will be going home Yes I will be going home
